description_long: This is a classic sailing yacht with a single monohull design, featuring a pointed bow and a rounded stern. The hull is primarily brown, resembling varnished wood, with a yellowish deck that appears open and unobstructed. The yacht is equipped with two large triangular white sails, one main sail and one jib, both attached to tall, slender masts. The deck is outfitted with visible rigging, ropes, and spars, but lacks any enclosed cabin or superstructure. The interior is open, with wooden benches and a simple, traditional layout. The overall appearance is elegant and streamlined, suitable for leisure sailing or small regattas.
description: A classic brown wooden sailing yacht with a yellow open deck and two large white sails, featuring traditional rigging and an open cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the brown hull, yellow deck, and both large white sails with visible rigging.
description_view_1: Narrow bow-on view highlighting the pointed front, the width of the hull, and the alignment of the sails and mast.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the hull, deck, and sails from the other side with similar details.
description_view_3: Stern view displaying the rounded back of the hull, the open deck, and the rearward extension of the main sail.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a pointed bow and rounded stern, smooth brown finish, no visible keels or chines, traditional wooden appearance.
attribute_deck_layout: Single open deck with yellow planking, no raised levels or enclosed areas, visible benches along the sides, and traditional rigging equipment.
attribute_cabin_structure: No visible cabin structure; the deck is open with no enclosed superstructure, windows, or doors.
